name: Ed Debevic's Coconut Cream Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Place eggs in a mixing bowl and whisk for 1 minute.
2. Add vanilla extract and 1/4 cup sugar, whisk until smooth.
3. Add flour and cornstarch, whisk until smooth.
4. Gradually add 3/4 cup milk, whisking until smooth. Set aside.
5. In a stainless steel saucepan, combine 1-1/2 cups milk and Half & Half.
6. Add 1/2 cup plus 2-1/2 tablespoons sugar all at once, covering the entire surface.
7. Do not stir. Bring to boil over medium heat.
8. Gradually whisk in the egg mixture into the saucepan, continuing to bring it to a boil.
9. Continue whisking and cooking for an additional 20 seconds.
10. Pour the mixture into a mixing bowl and whisk in the butter until melted.
11. Fold in the coconut flakes.
12. Pour the coconut cream mixture into the baked pie shell.
13. Cover the pie completely with plastic wrap and refrigerate for 2 to 3 hours.
14. Remove the plastic wrap and cut into wedges.
15. Top with whipped cream and toasted coconut flakes.
As I say, "Have Mercy." Glad to share this!
